texto: Perfection is impossible.Expecting the best from yourselfisn’t about trying to be perfect
autor: it’s about striving to bethe best you can be.
explicacao: Citação de it’s about striving to bethe best you can be. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Perfection is impossible.Expecting the best from yourselfisn’t about trying to be perfect” articula reflexao, domonique-bertolucci, perfection em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
